rationale: Top-of-form widget for the consenting corporation's current Maine name (the entity holding rights to the name being shared).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The above-named corporation hereby consents to the use of the following indistinguishable name:
rationale: The specific indistinguishable name the consenting corporation authorizes another entity to use.
Name of the applicant entity that wishes to use the indistinguishable name.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The entity in possession of the name must change its name to:*
rationale: The new distinguishable name the consenting corporation undertakes to adopt to resolve the indistinguishability. Per the page-0 footnote, this application must be accompanied by the applicable form to make this name change effective.
Date the application was signed by the consenting corporation's authorized officer.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of any duly authorized officer) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the signer. Shape D per schema-gaps/2026-04-30-filing-signer-shape.md (single widget asking for printed name and capacity together; capacity is broader than title, e.g., 'President', 'Authorized Officer').

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive). Should mirror entity.name.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 (note: typo 'entitys' preserved upstream). Used when this consent is filed alongside the accompanying name-change form (MBCA-9) — this slot would carry the second filing's entity name.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($20 base per page-0 fee header, plus expedite premium and any accompanying-form fees).
